general_notes: 1. ALL NEW HARDWARE SHALL COMPLY WITH THE ACCESSIBILITY REQUIREMENTS OF THE AMERICANS WITH DISABILITIES ACT, T.A.S., AND ALL LOCAL AUTHORITY REGULATIONS.
2. COMPLY WITH LOCAL APPLICABLE CODES WITH RESPECT TO FIRE RATING OF DOORS, FRAMES AND RELATED HARDWARE.
3. SUBMIT DOOR SHOP DRAWINGS, A DETAILED HARDWARE & KEYING SCHEDULE & FINISH HARDWARE SAMPLES TO ARCHITECT FOR REVIEW & APPROVAL PRIOR TO ORDERING MATERIALS.
4. LOCATED ALL DOORS, HINGE SIDE, 6" FROM ADJACENT WALL UNLESS NOTED OTHERWISE.
5. ALL LOCKSETS ARE TO BE KEYED SEPARATELY WITH MASTER KEY PROVIDED UNLESS NOTED OTHERWISE. CONFIRM KEYING SCHEME WITH OWNER AND EXISTING CAMPUS.
6. ALL DOORSTOPS TO BE FLOOR MOUNTED UNLESS NOTED OTHERWISE. ALL HARDWARE SIMILARLY MOUNTED TO BE INSTALLED AFTER THE INSTALLATION OF THE FINISHED FLOOR MATERIAL.
7. PAIRS OF DOORS WILL REQUIRE APPLICABLE ASTRAGALS, FLUSH BOLTS AND COORDINATORS, UNLESS NOTED OTHERWISE. RE: DOOR HARDWARE SCHEDULE FOR MORE INFORMATION.
8. UNDERCUT DOORS ARE REQUIRED TO CLEAR FINISH FLOORING MATERIAL BY 1/4". ALL RATED DOORS SHALL BE ORDERED TO CLEAR FINISH FLOORING MATERIAL BY 1/4".
hardware_preamble:
1. ALL NEW HARDWARE SHALL COMPLY WITH THE ACCESSIBILITY REQUIREMENTS 
OF THE AMERICANS WITH DISABILITIES ACT, T.A.S., AND ALL LOCAL AUTHORITY 
REGULATIONS.

2. COMPLY WITH LOCAL APPLICABLE CODES WITH RESPECT TO FIRE RATING OF 
DOORS, FRAMES AND RELATED HARDWARE.

3. SUBMIT DOOR SHOP DRAWINGS, A DETAILED HARDWARE & KEYING SCHEDULE 
& FINISH HARDWARE SAMPLES TO ARCHITECT FOR REVIEW & APPROVAL PRIOR 
TO ORDERING MATERIALS.

4. LOCATED ALL DOORS, HINGE SIDE, 6" FROM ADJACENT WALL UNLESS NOTED 
OTHERWISE.

6. ALL DOORSTOPS TO BE FLOOR MOUNTED UNLESS NOTED OTHERWISE. ALL 
HARDWARE SIMILARLY MOUNTED TO BE INSTALLED AFTER THE INSTALLATION OF 
THE FINISHED FLOOR MATERIAL.

7. PAIRS OF DOORS WILL REQUIRE APPLICABLE ASTRAGALS, FLUSH BOLTS AND 
COORDINATORS, UNLESS NOTED OTHERWISE. RE: DOOR HARDWARE SCHEDULE 
FOR MORE INFORMATION.

8. UNDERCUT DOORS ARE REQUIRED TO CLEAR FINISH FLOORING MATERIAL BY 
1/4". ALL RATED DOORS SHALL BE ORDERED TO CLEAR FINISH FLOORING 
MATERIAL BY 1/4".

5. ALL LOCKSETS ARE TO BE KEYED SEPARATELY WITH MASTER KEY PROVIDED UNLESS NOTED OTHERWISE. CONFIRM KEYING SCHEME WITH OWNER AND EXISTING CAMPUS.

project_risks.recommendation: Issue RFI to confirm hardware set assignments before bidding.

project_risks.issue: 6 fire-rated opening(s) require coordinated UL-listed door, frame and hardware assemblies.
project_risks.recommendation: Confirm labels, positive latching, closers and gasketing requirements.

rfi_log.question: The door schedule does not show a hardware set for: 141A, 141B, 141C, 141D. Please confirm the intended hardware set for each.

estimator_notes: Keying notes captured from the drawings (3 line(s)); verify keyway, master structure, cylinder format and key counts.
62 opening(s) extracted from the schedule. Verify all marks against the source PDF before submitting bid.
18 hardware set(s) identified; 18 have a complete extracted item list.
8 general note(s) captured from the door-schedule sheet.
7 hardware-preamble note(s) captured from hardware-set sheet(s).

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
allowances_to_consider: Allowance for fire-rated assembly coordination, S-label gasketing and any UL field-modification charges.
coordination_items: Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
